Happy
Birthday

"You make every ordinary day feel like something magical."

✏️ Drawn with love by Rohan

🌸 The beautiful Aswini

Hey Aswini!

Okay so real talk — I still remember the first time I saw you and honestly? I didn't know what hit me! 😄

There you were, just existing like it was nothing, while I was over here trying to act cool and failing completely! 😂

You had this energy about you — the kind that makes everyone in the room smile without even trying. And I thought to myself — "okay I NEED to know this person."

Then I drew you… And look at us now! 🥹

Best decision I ever made, honestly.

So on your birthday I just want you to know — You are the kind of person who makes ordinary days feel like something special. You bring so much light, laughter and joy to everything around you, and I am SO lucky I get to call you my friend! 💛

Now stop reading this and go enjoy your day because you absolutely deserve every single good thing coming your way today! 🎊🎈

Happy Birthday beautiful! Have the most amazing day! 🥳🎂✨

With happy you loads,
Rohan 😊
🎂 🎉 🎈 🌸 💛 ✨ 🎊
Made with love · Happy Birthday Aswini ✦ 2026
